'''gazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:otherweise|otherweise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:otherweise|otherweise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gazhate|gazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gazhatesher|gazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gazhatesherĂ«m|gazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gazhatero|gazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gazhateshĂ«|gazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gazhateshĂ«m|gazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigazhatero|gokigazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigazhateshĂ«|gokigazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigazhateshĂ«m|gokigazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogazhankerom|gogazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogazhankeshĂ«|gogazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogazhankeshĂ«m|gogazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogazhankeya|gogazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gazhaterom|gazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gazhatemu|gazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gazhateya|gazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigazhaterom|gokigazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigazhatemu|gokigazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigazhateya|gokigazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gazhazhate|gazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gazhazhatesher|gazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gazhazhatesherĂ«m|gazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gazhazhatero|gazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gazhazhateshĂ«|gazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gazhazhateshĂ«m|gazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigazhazhatero|gokigazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigazhazhateshĂ«|gokigazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigazhazhateshĂ«m|gokigazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogazhazhankerom|gogazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogazhazhankeshĂ«|gogazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogazhazhankeshĂ«m|gogazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogazhazhankeya|gogazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gazhazhaterom|gazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gazhazhatemu|gazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gazhazhateya|gazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigazhazhaterom|gokigazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigazhazhatemu|gokigazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigazhazhateya|gokigazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠzhĂŠte|gĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠzhĂŠtesher|gĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠzhĂŠtero|gĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokigĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gogĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠzhĂŠterom|gĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠzhĂŠteya|gĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokigĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokigĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafzhafte|gafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafzhaftesher|gafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafzhaftesherĂ«m|gafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafzhaftero|gafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafzhafteshĂ«|gafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafzhafteshĂ«m|gafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafzhaftero|gokigafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafzhafteshĂ«|gokigafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafzhafteshĂ«m|gokigafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafzhafnkerom|gogafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafzhafnkeshĂ«|gogafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gogafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafzhafnkeya|gogafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafzhafterom|gafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafzhaftemu|gafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafzhafteya|gafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafzhafterom|gokigafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafzhaftemu|gokigafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafzhafteya|gokigafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
